Title: Save-for-Later — three Text-configs of same configurable product stay distinct in saved bucket
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Save For Later > Configurable
Preconditions: Runner-native. Validates PR #118 fix: addItem 3× with different Text custom values (A/B/C) on CFG_RING. clearCart pre-clean. moveToSavedForLater all 3 lines. Assert saved 'list' has 3 distinct lineItems each retaining its own customText.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=setup_me] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_a] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_b] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_c] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_cart_after_adds] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=move_all_saved] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.length = 3
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.0.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.1.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.2.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.1.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[DATA label=read_cart_after_adds] data.cart.items.2.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[COUNT label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.cart.items.length = 0
[COUNT label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.length = 3
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.0.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.1.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.2.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.1.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[DATA label=move_all_saved] data.moveToSavedForLater.list.items.2.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] BL-CART-007: distinct configurations produce distinct lineItems; PR #118 preserves config when moving to saved-for-later
Failure_Signals: saved 'list' has fewer than 3 items; configurationItems missing or merged; customText null in saved bucket

Title: Save-for-Later — moveFromSavedForLater restores configuration to active cart
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Save For Later > Configurable
Preconditions: Runner-native. Seeds 3 saved configs (A/B/C) → moves only B back → asserts active cart has B's config, saved list still has A + C.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=move_b_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.length = 1
[COUNT label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.list.items.length >= 2
[DATA label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.productId = {{ring_id}}
[DATA label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.cart.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText = {{SAVED_0_TEXT}}
[DATA label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.list.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
[DATA label=move_b_back] data.moveFromSavedForLater.list.items.1.configurationItems.0.customText is non-null
Failure_Signals: active cart item has empty/null configurationItems; wrong text appears in active cart; saved bucket shrunk by more than 1

Title: Edit-Configuration flow — replace lineItem and preserve the new config
Preconditions: Runner-native. Simulates 'Edit Configuration' by: addItem with text_a → removeCartItem → addItem with text_b. Verifies new line has text_b and old text_a no longer present.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_initial] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=remove_old] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_replacement] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_after_edit] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_after_edit] data.cart.items.length = 1
[DATA label=read_after_edit] data.cart.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText = {{text_b}}
[DATA label=read_after_edit] data.cart.items.0.productId = {{ring_id}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] BL-CART-007: replace flow keeps only the new config
Failure_Signals: post-edit line has old text_a; post-edit line has empty configurationItems; multiple lines persist

Title: BL-CART-007 complement — re-adding identical config increments quantity
Preconditions: Runner-native. addItem with text_a, then addItem with same text_a. Expect single line, quantity 2.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_first] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_second_same] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=read_back] data.cart.items.length = 1
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items.0.quantity = 2
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items.0.configurationItems.0.customText = {{text_a}}
